patch.value: Close c8-exposed coverage gaps in src/cli/commands/contracts.ts and restore.ts to 100%

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: contracts.ts: branch 1326 (provider 'mixed') now covered by a real test — new 'marks a core command with extension-registered flags as mixed provider' spec registers an extension flag via api.registerFlags('list', ...) so a core command surfaces both core + extension flags. Statements 1661/1666 (return null) and branches 1660/1665/1669 (schema-branch defensive guards over PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA) are provably unreachable (the hardcoded schema always yields well-formed action branches with string const); fixed the mis-placed single-line c8 ignore markers by wrapping each defensive if-body and the ternary fallback in c8 ignore start/stop with PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA-specific justifications. restore.ts: branch 218 falsy arm (empty reasonSuffix) is provably unreachable through applyHistoryPatch — jsonPatch/structuredClone/normalizeReplayPatchOps only throw Error instances with non-empty messages, so extractPatchFailureContext always sets reason; replaced the mis-placed c8 ignore next with a c8 ignore start/stop around the reasonSuffix ternary. Both files: zero-uncovered in isolated focused coverage (contracts single-spec; restore across restore+history-activity+close-many+register-commands specs — 152/153/261 are single-spec over-reports covered by history-activity-command.spec). Also corrected the invalid 'c8 ignore end' -> 'c8 ignore stop' markers within both files (the masking bug). No test-only exports added (reused existing _testOnlyContractsCommand/_testOnlyRestoreCommand seams). tsc clean; both specs pass (55 tests).

patch.value: All assigned coverage targets closed to genuine 100%. contracts.ts: branch 1326 ('mixed' provider) covered by a new real test (extension registerFlags on core 'list' command); stmts 1661/1666 + branches 1660/1665/1669 are provably-unreachable PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA defensive guards, annotated with corrected c8 ignore start/stop. restore.ts: branch 218 (empty reasonSuffix) is provably unreachable via applyHistoryPatch, annotated with c8 ignore start/stop. Both files zero-uncovered in focused mode; invalid 'c8 ignore end' markers corrected to 'stop'. No source files outside contracts.ts/restore.ts touched (test added to contracts spec only); no test-only exports added. tsc clean, 55 tests pass.
